title: Applications Analysis: 2022 vs 2025 (Pre vs Post LLM)
subtitle: LinkedIn Applications – Volume, Tempo, and Patterns

slides.title: Objective & Data
bullets: Compare application intensity and cadence (2022 vs 2025)
Method: pandas resampling; 7-day gap to define periods

slides.title: Monthly Trend (All Years)
slides.caption: Context across all years; activity spikes in 2022 and sustained run in 2025.

slides.title: Heatmap: Year × Month
slides.caption: 2022 concentrates Apr–May; 2025 sustains Mar–Jul with higher volume.

slides.title: Monthly Overlay: 2022 vs 2025
slides.caption: 2025 starts earlier and stays consistently higher month-to-month.

slides.title: Cumulative: 2022 vs 2025
slides.caption: Cumulative curve in 2025 outpaces 2022 throughout the cycle.

slides.title: Weekday Distribution (Comparison)
slides.caption: Both skew to weekdays; 2025 dominates across all days.

slides.title: Next: Response/Interest Layer (Gmail)
bullets: Ingest replies; compute response & interview rates
Segment by company and period; time-to-first-response

slides.title: Summary & Takeaways
bullets: Clear pre/post LLM distinction in pace and persistence
